# Vocabulary (always-on)

Use this project's canonical terms (full table in `LANGUAGE.md`). Do not introduce synonyms.

- A "{{CONTROLLER_TERM}}" is the inbound web adapter (thin).
- A "{{SERVICE_TERM}}" is the application/use-case layer and owns the transaction.
- A "{{REPOSITORY_TERM}}" is the persistence port.
- Name new types to match these terms; reviewers reject drift (e.g. "manager"/"helper" where a service is meant).
